function.content:
---
record_type: invoice
invoice_number: INV-0010
alias: helios_checklist_pack_invoice
issued_on: 2026-03-23
total_eur: 780
counterparty: Helios Steuerbüro München GmbH
project: Helios Workflow Sprint
related_entity: Claudia Reiter
lines:
  - item: checklist rewrite and rollout pack
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 780
    line_eur: 780
---
# Helios checklist rewrite invoice

```text
+----------------+--------------------------------+
| field          | value                          |
+----------------+--------------------------------+
| record_type    | invoice                        |
| invoice_number | INV-0010                       |
| alias          | helios_checklist_pack_invoice  |
| issued_on      | 2026-03-23                     |
| total_eur      | 780                            |
| counterparty   | Helios Steuerbüro München GmbH |
| project        | Helios Workflow Sprint         |
| related_entity | Claudia Reiter                 |
+----------------+--------------------------------+
```

## Line Items

```text
+---+------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| # | item                               | qty | unit_eur | line_eur |
+---+------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| 1 | checklist rewrite and rollout pack | 1   | 780      | 780      |
+---+------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
|   | TOTAL                              |     |          | 780      |
+---+------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
```

## Notes

Recent client-visible invoice tied to the sprint deliverable rather than open-ended product thinking.

next_step.current_state: Frontmatter migration write succeeded; inbox-processing workflow requires removing processed inbox item after successful structured-record maintenance. Outbox reactive check was not applicable to this finance note write.

function.message: Completed the oldest inbox task. I OCR-structured `50_finance/invoices/2026_03_23__eur_000780__inv_0010__helios_checklist_pack_invoice.md` by adding invoice YAML frontmatter from visible note data (including ordered `lines`) and preserved the original note body verbatim below the frontmatter. Then I removed the processed inbox file `00_inbox/000_next-task.md` per inbox-processing workflow.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed mandatory bootstrap (tree/read/context), loaded relevant system workflows and schema before task work, preserved original body during frontmatter migration, kept diff focused, and deleted processed inbox item only after successful completion.
function.outcome_justification: Evidence in `00_inbox/000_next-task.md` requested OCR/frontmatter extraction for the specified invoice. The invoice file contained all required visible fields defined by `99_system/schemas/finance-record-frontmatter.md`, enabling a complete schema-compliant migration. `99_system/workflows/inbox-processing-v2-update.md` instructs removing the inbox item after successful structured-record maintenance, which was done.
completed_steps_laconic: write migrated frontmatter into target invoice
